privileged_info_summary: Synthetic plant propagation task with 12 cutting records (2024-09-15 to 2024-12-05). Task parameters: 180-second timeout, 25 max steps, medium difficulty, 7 success criteria, 70% pass threshold (5/7 required). Data structure: 3 propagation methods (Water, Soil, Perlite), 3 status values (Rooted, Failed, Pending), 5 plant species, spanning 81 days. Verified success rates from actual data: Water 80% (4 rooted/5 attempts), Soil 25% (1 rooted/4 attempts), Perlite 66.7% (2 rooted/3 attempts). Data is entirely synthetic, created in setup_task.sh. Output file: propagation_analysis.ods (ODS format). Required formulas: date calculations (=TODAY()-date), COUNTIF/COUNTIFS with absolute references for counting, percentage formatting with ±2% accuracy tolerance, and conditional formatting (green=Rooted, red=Failed).
